allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== git available? ==="; $g = Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { git --version; Write-Output "Path: $\($g.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "git NOT on PATH" })

PowerShell($cfg = "$env:APPDATA\\GitHub Desktop"; Write-Output "=== GH Desktop config dir ==="; Test-Path $cfg; Get-ChildItem $cfg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "=== logins / accounts \(sanitized\) ==="; $accts = Get-Content "$cfg\\.git-credentials" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($accts\){"git-credentials file exists"} else {"no .git-credentials in config"})
